jobs.name: github-bounty-income-30m
jobs.prompt: Run deterministic GitHub bounty income pipeline: Scout + Score + Repo Analysis Gate + Report. This unattended job may clone or fetch candidate repositories into .hermes/bounty-workspace for inspection and reporting only. It must not claim bounties, create branches, commit, push, create PRs, or make code changes unless the user has explicitly confirmed a TAKE target in the current thread. It may add comments to GitHub issues or PRs only when explicitly part of the safe reporting workflow. Use GitHub CLI scouting across Python, TypeScript, Rust, and Go with bounty/paid/reward/sponsor/good first issue/help wanted/explicit amount terms. Collect title, url, repository, labels, updatedAt, createdAt, commentsCount, and body when available. Exclude radar/artifact aggregation repos, duplicate claim issues, stale or vague tasks without maintainer authorization, private vulnerability requests, unclear payout or acceptance terms, and unauthorized exploit/scanning activity. TAKE requires clear payout terms, acceptance criteria, active maintainer/project signals, low legal/security risk, plausible implementation path, and likely local verification path. WATCH/SKIP must stay quiet by returning DONT_NOTIFY/wakeAgent=false after writing a local report. TAKE must output repo, issue URL, language, bounty evidence, legitimacy reasoning, smallest viable contribution, likely files, tests, PR/submission path, validation checklist, and rollback/debug path, and trigger the macOS notification command.
